< Home >

PUT restapi/personal/courses/{courseId}/aisettings/v1

Updates the course.

Request Information

URI Parameters

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
courseId

The course identifier

 integer

Required

Body Parameters

Course entity

Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Course.CourseAiSettings
NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
CourseId

The course identifier

 integer

None.
Subject

The Subject of the course

 string

None.
Curriculum

Curriculum for the course

 string

None.
Language

Language for the AI generated content

 string

None.
Age

Age group of students in the course

 string

None.

Request Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
{
  "CourseId": 1,
  "Subject": "sample string 2",
  "Curriculum": "sample string 3",
  "Language": "sample string 4",
  "Age": "sample string 5"
}

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<CourseAiSettings xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Course">
  <Age>sample string 5</Age>
  <CourseId>1</CourseId>
  <Curriculum>sample string 3</Curriculum>
  <Language>sample string 4</Language>
  <Subject>sample string 2</Subject>
</CourseAiSettings>

application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Sample: 
No sample available

Response Information

Resource Description

None.
